title: OXG Modpack Client
description: The OX Gaming Modpack is a Vanilla+ modpack to play Minecraft SMP with friends.
body:
# OXG Modpack - The Definitive Vanilla+ Experience

Welcome to the OXG Modpack, the definitive Vanilla+ experience, now available in two tailored editions: **Essential** and **Pro**. Both are designed to enrich every aspect of Minecraft for the perfect SMP adventure.

This is a comprehensive modpack for both the **Client and Server**, engineered to work together to provide a stable and cohesive experience for all players.

## Which Version Should You Choose?

This project has two separate downloads. Choose the one that best fits your playstyle and PC hardware.

#### Download `Essential` if...
- You want the core Vanilla+ gameplay with **maximum performance and stability**.
- You have an older PC, a laptop, or simply prioritize high FPS above all else.
- You want a lightweight, fast, and reliable experience.

#### Download `Pro` if...
- You want the ultimate visual and immersive experience with **shader support, enhanced animations, and realistic sound physics**.
- You have a mid-to-high-end gaming PC that can handle graphical enhancements.
- You want every bell and whistle for the most breathtaking adventure possible.

---

## The Essential Experience (The Foundation for Both Packs)

Every player gets to enjoy a Minecraft that is fundamentally better, no matter which version you choose.

### ⛰️ Renewed Exploration and Adventure
The world is vast and full of surprises. Say goodbye to repetitive landscapes!

-   **Epic New Biomes:** Explore hundreds of new biomes across the Overworld, Nether, and End with mods like **Biomes O' Plenty**, **Incendium**, and **Nullscape**.
-   **Reimagined Structures:** Discover completely redesigned and challenging dungeons, temples, villages, and strongholds with the full suite of **YUNG's Better...** mods and **Dungeons and Taverns**.
-   **Threatening Dimensions:** Venture into a new realm of darkness with **Deeper and Darker**.
-   **Explorer's Tools:** Never get lost again with the help of **Nature's Compass** and **Explorer's Compass**.

### ⚔️ Dynamic and Challenging Combat
Minecraft's combat has been completely modernized to be more agile and strategic.

-   **Modern Combat System:** Swing in any direction, dual-wield effectively, and feel the impact of every hit with **Better Combat**.
-   **New Abilities:** Roll to dodge attacks, use class-based skills with the **RPG Series (Archers, Paladins)**, and discover new weapons and enchantments.
-   **Invasions and Events:** Defend your base from periodic Illager invasions and prepare to encounter new types of monsters with **Friends&Foes**.

### 💎 Top-Tier Performance and Stability
Play on a server that just works. Optimized with the best performance mods to ensure a stable TPS and high FPS.

-   **Optimized Engine:** Powered by **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **C2ME** to guarantee the best possible performance on both the client and the server.
-   **Less Lag, More Gameplay:** Drastically reduces lag spikes caused by world generation and entities.

### 🏡 Quality of Life and Building
Small tweaks that make a huge difference in your day-to-day gameplay.

-   **Teleportation Network:** Create your own fast-travel network with **Waystones**.
-   **Less Punishing Death:** Recover your items safely with the **Universal Graves** system.
-   **Decoration and Customization:** Use hundreds of new decorative blocks with **Chipped** and **Handcrafted**.
-   **Enhanced Mechanics:** Pick up small animals and chests with **Carry On**, enjoy a deeper sleeping mechanic with **Sleep Tight**, and organize your loot with **Lootr**.

---

## ✨ The Pro Upgrade: What's Added on Top?

By choosing the **Pro** edition, you get all of the above, plus a suite of high-end client-side mods for an unparalleled sensory experience.

-   **Breathtaking Visuals & Shaders:** The Pro pack is powered by **Iris Shaders**, allowing you to use your favorite shader packs. It also includes **Sodium Extra** and **Reese's Sodium Options** for fine-tuned graphical control, plus visual mods like **Visuality**, **Better Animations Collection**, and **Falling Leaves** for a more dynamic world.
-   **Unparalleled Immersion:** Feel the world around you with **Sound Physics Remastered** for realistic audio reverb and muffling, and hear every step with **Presence Footsteps**.
-   **Deep Customization & Enhanced UI:** Show off your style with **3D Skin Layers** and the flowing motion of **WaveyCapes**. Enjoy a redesigned advancement screen with **Better Advancements** and track your progress with **Advancement Plaques**.

---
## ⚙️ Installation
1. Choose and download the `.mrpack` file for either the **Essential** or **Pro** edition from the "Files" tab.
2. Use a modern launcher that supports Modrinth modpacks, such as [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/).
3. In your launcher, select "Import" or "Add Instance from Zip" and select the `.mrpack` file you downloaded. The launcher will handle the rest!

---
### ✨ Credits and Gratitude
This modpack wouldn't be possible without the incredible work of the modding community. A special thank you to the creators of the key mods that define this experience:

-   **Performance:** [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
-   **Visuals & Shaders (Pro):** [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by the IrisShaders Team
-   **World Generation:** [YUNG's API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) & Suite, [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Stardust Labs'](https://modrinth.com/user/Stardust_Labs) Suite (Incendium, Nullscape)
-   **Combat & RPG:** [Daedelus' Library](https://modrinth.com/user/Daedelus) (Better Combat, RPG Series)
-   **Quality of Life:** [BlayTheNinth's](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth) Mods (Waystones), [Patbox'](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox) Mods (Universal Graves)
-   **And many more!** This pack contains hundreds of amazing mods. Please support their creators.
